name: C-16 --paywalled requires both --document-url and --attribution per the paywalled-source contract
command:
printf 'line one
line two
line three
' > w.txt && touch cat.yaml && EDITOR= bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://x.com --id test --catalog cat.yaml --why-authoritative-file w.txt --paywalled 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -qE 'document-url|attribution' err.txt && echo required 1>&2
